findings.summary: Peloton Bike Plus (140 lbs) on second floor not recorded in CRM inventory
findings.quote: So first, my wife and I just realized we have this Peloton in the upstairs bedroom that we forgot to tell you about. It's the bigger one, the Bike Plus, I think it weighs around 140 pounds.

findings.summary: Destination building entrance is at service entrance off alley, not front entrance as shown in maps
findings.quote: The destination address, the one in Santa Monica, the building entrance is actually around the back, not the front like Google Maps shows. There's a service entrance off the alley.

findings.summary: Certificate of Insurance required 48 hours before move-in, must be sent to manager@elmtowers.example.com
findings.quote: They need a Certificate of Insurance, a COI, before move-in day. They were really firm about that. They want it sent to manager@elmtowers.example.com at least 48 hours before.

findings.summary: Freight elevator must be reserved and used between 10 am and 2 pm; regular elevator not permitted
findings.quote: The freight elevator has to be reserved between 10 am and 2 pm. They won't let movers use the regular elevator at all.

findings.summary: Mother-in-law will be at destination and speaks primarily Russian; crew has Russian-speaking members available
findings.quote: My mother-in-law is going to be at the destination to let the crew in. She doesn't speak much English. She speaks Russian mainly.

findings.summary: 75-gallon saltwater fish tank (empty, customer-drained) requires careful wrapping and must be fully dry
findings.quote: We have a saltwater fish tank, it's a 75 gallon tank. We're going to drain it ourselves but the tank itself, the empty glass tank, do you guys move that?

findings.summary: 3% credit card processing fee will be added to final total on move day
findings.quote: Credit card payment is fine, there's a small processing fee of three percent that gets added on the day of.
